name: plytix-mcp
description: Full Plytix PIM API coverage via MCP. 77 tools across products, assets, categories, variants, attributes, relationships, families, and accounts.

api_key.title: Plytix API Key
api_key.description: Your Plytix API key from accounts.plytix.com > Settings > API.

api_password.title: Plytix API Password
api_password.description: Your Plytix API password (paired with the API key).

read_only.title: Read-Only Mode
read_only.description: Set to 'true' to register only read tools (no create/update/delete). Useful for team members who should only view data.

tools.name: plytix_get_product
tools.description: Get full product details by ID including all attributes

tools.name: plytix_search_products
tools.description: Search products with filters and attribute selection

tools.name: plytix_bulk_update_products
tools.description: Bulk update multiple products in one request

tools.name: plytix_find_products_by_attribute
tools.description: Find products by custom attribute value (client-side filtering)

tools.name: plytix_add_product_assets
tools.description: Link assets to a product via a media gallery attribute

tools.name: plytix_get_product_assets
tools.description: Get assets linked to a product

tools.name: plytix_get_product_category_list
tools.description: Get category IDs a product belongs to

tools.name: plytix_add_product_relationships
tools.description: Link related products via a relationship type

tools.name: plytix_remove_product_relationships
tools.description: Unlink related products from a relationship

tools.name: plytix_get_product_relationships
tools.description: Get all relationship links for a product

tools.name: plytix_assign_product_family
tools.description: Assign a product family to a product (required — cannot use update_product)

tools.name: plytix_list_assets
tools.description: List assets with pagination and optional file type filter

tools.name: plytix_upload_asset_url
tools.description: Upload an asset from a public URL (handles duplicates)

tools.name: plytix_get_asset_download_url
tools.description: Get download URL for an asset

tools.name: plytix_get_category_tree
tools.description: Build hierarchical category tree from flat list

tools.name: plytix_add_product_subcategory
tools.description: Add a subcategory under a parent product category

tools.name: plytix_add_file_subcategory
tools.description: Add a subcategory under a parent file category

tools.name: plytix_list_variants
tools.description: List variants for a parent product

tools.name: plytix_create_variant
tools.description: Create a new variant under a parent product

tools.name: plytix_bulk_create_variants
tools.description: Create multiple variants for a product in one request

tools.name: plytix_resync_variant_attributes
tools.description: Resync variant attributes with the parent product

tools.name: plytix_list_attribute_groups
tools.description: List attribute groups (NOTE: Plytix API may return 500 — known upstream bug)

tools.name: plytix_get_attribute_group
tools.description: Get attribute group by ID (NOTE: Plytix API may return 500 — known upstream bug)

tools.name: plytix_create_attribute_group
tools.description: Create a new attribute group (NOTE: Plytix API may return 500 — known upstream bug)

tools.name: plytix_update_attribute_group
tools.description: Update an attribute group (NOTE: Plytix API may return 500 — known upstream bug)

tools.name: plytix_delete_attribute_group
tools.description: Delete an attribute group (NOTE: Plytix API may return 500 — known upstream bug)

tools.name: plytix_get_relationship
tools.description: Get relationship type definition by ID

tools.name: plytix_get_relationship_by_name
tools.description: Find a relationship definition by name (case-insensitive)

tools.name: plytix_create_relationship
tools.description: Create a new relationship type definition

tools.name: plytix_get_product_family
tools.description: Get product family details by ID

tools.name: plytix_link_family_attributes
tools.description: Link attributes to a product family

tools.name: plytix_unlink_family_attributes
tools.description: Unlink attributes from a product family

tools.name: plytix_get_family_attributes
tools.description: Get attributes directly linked to a product family

tools.name: plytix_get_family_all_attributes
tools.description: Get all attributes available to a family (direct + inherited)

tools.name: plytix_list_api_credentials
tools.description: List API credentials for the account

tools.name: plytix_get_product_filters
tools.description: Get available filter fields for product search

tools.name: plytix_get_asset_filters
tools.description: Get available filter fields for asset search

tools.name: plytix_get_relationship_filters
tools.description: Get available filter fields for relationship search
